sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108744" key="u(po/mazos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόμαζος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n108744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">under the breast,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπέρμαζος</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
